name: Managed Network & SD-WAN
description: Enterprise network management including SD-WAN, MPLS, LAN/WLAN operations, and network security. Leverages Deutsche Telekom's backbone infrastructure for high-performance, low-latency connectivity across global enterprise sites.
positioning: Network-as-a-Service backed by one of Europe's largest carrier networks. Unique combination of telco backbone and IT managed services integration.
competitive_moat: Deutsche Telekom backbone, carrier-grade SLAs, integrated IT+network operations
